failures.description: The agent misread or misapplied the price filter to the ProductCatalogSearch result and omitted item_id 5312063289 even though its price, $195.15, is greater than $194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to list available bamboo Skateboards costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 contained all required evidence. Four items satisfy the price condition: 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor used the tool output but omitted item_id 5312063289, which directly contradicts the returned prices. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved the incomplete answer.
